series_metadata.series_title: Equipment, Land and Building Inventory Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Original computer printout and instructions of inventories regarding non-expendable personal property.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report received, provided no federal funds involved. If federal funds are involved, retain an additional one (1) year, Paper: Wastepaper
